skill.name: Business Analyst
skill.description: Master modern business analysis with AI-powered analytics, real-time dashboards, and data-driven insights.
skill.summary: Expert business analyst skill for transforming complex data into actionable strategic recommendations using modern BI tools and predictive modeling.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Prompt-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files and detected 0 security issues. The skill provides business analysis guidance, KPI frameworks, and analytics best practices through instructional prompts only. No network access, file system operations, external commands, or environment variable access detected.

content.user_title: Transform data into strategic business decisions
content.value_statement: Businesses struggle to extract actionable insights from complex data. This skill delivers expert-level analysis, predictive modeling, and executive-ready dashboards that drive confident decision-making.
actual_capabilities: Design comprehensive KPI frameworks with North Star metrics and OKR alignment
Build predictive models for customer churn, revenue forecasting, and market trends
Create executive dashboards with Tableau, Power BI, Looker, and Qlik Sense
Perform statistical analysis including A/B testing, hypothesis testing, and cohort analysis
Develop customer segmentation, persona models, and journey mapping
Generate financial models for unit economics, LTV/CAC optimization, and scenario planning
limitations: Cannot directly connect to live data sources or databases
Requires user to provide raw data or export files for analysis
Cannot execute SQL queries or run analytics code directly
Dashboard designs must be manually implemented in BI tools by the user

use_cases.title: Executive Dashboard Design
use_cases.description: Create comprehensive executive dashboards that consolidate key business metrics with trend analysis, automated alerts, and drill-down capabilities for leadership decision-making.

use_cases.title: Customer Analytics Program
use_cases.description: Build predictive churn models, customer lifetime value frameworks, and segmentation analysis to optimize acquisition strategies and retention initiatives.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing analysts and customer success teams

use_cases.title: Financial Planning Automation
use_cases.description: Develop revenue forecasting models, scenario planning frameworks, and unit economics analysis to support strategic planning and investor reporting.

prompt_templates.title: KPI Framework Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Define North Star metrics and supporting KPIs for our [business type]. Include metric definitions, data sources, calculation formulas, and target benchmarks aligned with our strategic objectives.

prompt_templates.title: Churn Analysis Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze our customer churn data from [time period]. Identify patterns in churned customers, build a risk scoring model, and recommend prevention strategies with expected impact on retention rates.

prompt_templates.title: Dashboard Specification
prompt_templates.prompt: Design an executive dashboard for [department/function]. Specify chart types, metrics, filters, and layout. Include data refresh requirements, alert thresholds, and mobile responsiveness considerations.

prompt_templates.title: Market Sizing Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Conduct TAM/SAM/SOM analysis for [product/service] in [market/region]. Include methodology, data sources, segmentation criteria, growth rate assumptions, and competitive landscape assessment.

output_examples.input: Analyze Q4 customer churn for our SaaS platform
output_examples.output: Comprehensive churn report showing 12% Q4 churn rate driven by onboarding friction (45% of churned users), pricing concerns (28%), and feature gaps (17%). Predictive model identifies 230 at-risk accounts with 85% accuracy. Recommended interventions: streamlined onboarding flow, targeted win-back campaigns, and proactive success outreach.

Three-scenario revenue model: Base case projects $12.4M ARR (28% growth), optimistic case reaches $14.1M with enterprise expansion, conservative case at $10.8M assuming market headwinds. Key drivers include 95% retention target, $45K average expansion revenue, and 180-day sales cycle. Sensitivity analysis shows churn rate and ACV as primary variance factors.

best_practices: Always validate data quality and methodology before drawing conclusions from any analysis
Design dashboards for specific audience needs with progressive disclosure from executive summary to detailed views
Establish clear metric definitions and calculation standards to ensure organizational alignment
anti_patterns: Avoid vanity metrics that look impressive but do not drive actionable business decisions
Do not present raw data without context, benchmarks, or interpretation of business implications
Never recommend actions based on correlation without investigating causation and confounding factors

faq.question: What data formats does this skill support for analysis?
faq.answer: This skill works with any data you can provide in text format including CSV exports, JSON data, SQL query results, or structured summaries. For large datasets, provide aggregated views or sample subsets with clear context about the full data scope.

faq.question: Can this skill create actual dashboards in Tableau or Power BI?
faq.answer: This skill provides detailed dashboard specifications including chart types, metric definitions, layout recommendations, and implementation guidance. You will need to build the actual dashboards in your BI tool using these specifications.

faq.question: How accurate are the predictive models generated?
faq.answer: Model accuracy depends entirely on your data quality, sample size, and feature selection. This skill provides statistically sound methodologies and helps you interpret results correctly. Always validate models against holdout data before operational use.

faq.question: Can this skill help with SQL query writing for data extraction?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill can write SQL queries, explain query optimization, and help design data extraction logic. However, queries must be executed by you in your database environment.

faq.question: What statistical methods are available for A/B testing analysis?
faq.answer: This skill supports t-tests, chi-square tests, Bayesian analysis, sequential testing, power analysis, and multi-armed bandit approaches. It also helps design experiments with proper sample sizes and significance thresholds.

faq.question: Does this skill provide industry-specific analytics guidance?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill covers analytics for e-commerce, SaaS, healthcare, financial services, manufacturing, and marketing. Specify your industry context to receive relevant frameworks, benchmarks, and best practices.
